problem.description: npx viepilot install crashes immediately with uv_cwd / process.cwd ENOENT
symptoms: npm validate-engines throws before any ViePilot code runs
Error mentions current working directory was likely removed
error_messages: Error: ENOENT: process.cwd failed with error no such file or directory

hypotheses.description: Shell cwd points at a deleted or moved directory; npm/npx calls process.cwd() at startup
ViePilot package or install script bug

findings: Stack trace is entirely inside npm (/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/npm/...), not viepilot.
Node v25.8.1 + Homebrew npm; failure is cwd lifecycle, not ViePilot semver.

resolution.root_cause: The terminal session's current working directory no longer exists on disk (folder deleted/renamed, or tab restored in bad state). npm/npx requires a valid cwd before loading config.
resolution.fix_applied: User action: cd to an existing path (e.g. $HOME or project root), or open a new terminal tab, then re-run npx viepilot install.
resolution.verification: From valid cwd: `pwd` prints existing path; `npx viepilot --list-targets` runs without uv_cwd error.
